name: Intune Devices Not Compliant
description: Identifies Intune-managed devices reporting a non-compliant state
query: SELECT id, device_name, user_principal_name, compliance_state, operating_system, os_version FROM intune_managed_devices WHERE COALESCE(LOWER(compliance_state), '') != 'compliant'
remediation: Review non-compliant devices, remediate configuration gaps, and enforce Intune compliance policies.
